# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About נילי ברקוביץ'
A law firm or individual attorney landing page aimed at presenting legal services in a professional and trustworthy manner. The business is run by a female lawyer seeking to attract potential clients through a focused, single-page website.

## Target Audience
- בעלי הון גבוה
